meta.title: Tablix - Transform complex spreadsheets into ready-to-use files
meta.description: Upload your spreadsheet, select the columns you need and generate a new file in seconds. Web tool for custom spreadsheet processing and generation.

hero.title: Transform complex spreadsheets into ready-to-use files
hero.subtitle: Upload your spreadsheet, select the columns you need and generate a new file in seconds.

upload.description: Upload your CSV or XLSX file

audience.title: Who is it for

roles.recurring: People who deal with recurring spreadsheets

audience.description: Tablix was created to reduce repetitive tasks and save time in operational activities with spreadsheets.

pricing.title: Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose the ideal plan for your needs

free.name: Free
free.description: Ideal for testing the workflow and understanding if Tablix solves your problem.

pro.name: Pro
pro.launchPrice: Launch price guaranteed while subscription is active

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For companies with high volume or specific needs.

footer.security: Your files are processed temporarily and securely.
footer.privacy: Tablix does not store your files. They are discarded after processing.

upload.title: Upload your spreadsheet
upload.subtitle: Free plan: up to 500 rows and 3 columns

status.clickToAddMore: Click above to add more files

messages.tooManyFiles: Too many files. Maximum {max} files for {plan} plan.
messages.fileTooLarge: "{name}" is too large. Maximum file size for {plan} plan is {size}.
messages.totalSizeExceeded: Total size exceeded. Maximum total size for {plan} plan is {size}.
messages.selectAtLeastOneColumn: Please select at least one column
messages.tooManyColumns: Too many columns selected. Maximum {max} columns for {plan} plan.
messages.processingOnServer: Files are large, processing on server...
messages.unificationLimitExceeded: Unification limit exceeded. You have used {current}/{max} unifications this month.
messages.rowsExceedLimit: Total rows ({total}) exceed the limit. Maximum {max} rows for {plan} plan.
messages.noCommonColumns: No common columns found across all files. Files must have at least one column in common.
messages.foundCommonColumns: Found {count} common columns. You can select up to {max} for your {plan} plan.
messages.parsedSuccessSingle: Parsed successfully! Found {columns} columns and {rows} rows.
messages.parsedSuccessMultiple: Parsed {files} files! Found {columns} common columns and {rows} total rows.
